context: Path:  noncommunicating spherical cyst; may contain ectopic gastric mucosa in 21%, small bowel mucosa, pancreatic tissue Location:   1st + 2nd portion of duodenum Site:  on mesenteric side of anterior wall √  mass in concavity of duodenal C-loop √  compression + displacement of 1st / 2nd portion of duodenum superiorly + anteriorly Cholangiography: √  may communicate with pancreatic ductal system through the aberrant duct of an accessory lobe Cx:  pancreatitis ← perforation of duplication cyst DDx:  pancreatic cyst, pancreatic pseudocyst, choledochal cyst, choledochocele, duodenal intramural tu
